nodes.title: Rudy’s Country Store & Bar-B-Q Raises $117K for SA Cancer Council
Programmatic TV Buying is Still a Fantasy
Some 22% of Senior Ad Buyers Plan to Advertise on Snapchat in 2016

pageContext.content:
The PM Group is excited and incredibly proud to announce our new relationship with Triumph Over Kid Cancer, a non-profit organization born to fight and ultimately prevent cancer in pediatric patients.
 
Triumph Over Kid Cancer started as 13-year-old James A. Ragan’s dream. As a victim of cancer himself, James fought valiantly for seven years before ultimately succumbing to the illness. Although he’s no longer with us, his spirit, vision, and foundation live on. Triumph Over Kid Cancer has now grown into a cancer-fighting powerhouse, raising over $2 million since 2010.
 
While providing funding for cancer and research, Triumph Over Kid Cancer allows fellow members of the community to engage with the nonprofit by way of volunteering hours, attending special events, and donating directly to the cause.
 
“The beautiful thing about this company is that we help brands and brick and mortar businesses to tailor and send their message exactly where it needs to go,” said Bob Wills, PM Group founder, and CEO. “I love every day of work, but this business is the most rewarding when I get to help incredible causes like Triumph Over Kid Cancer. Many folks like to say that they care, but it’s exciting to actually realize that we’re making a difference here.” He added, “We’re really impacting lives.”
 
“We are so incredibly blessed and excited to be working with The PM Group” stated co-founder Mecklin Ragan. “We’ve seen what the agency has done around Texas. We couldn’t be more excited to have their advertising prowess, marketing expertise, and media influence in our corner,” she said.
 
The PM Group will be the media agency of record in San Antonio and Corpus Christi.
 
About The PM Group:
Marketing a non-profit’s unique products and services requires an often-unique set of skills. At The PM Group, we possess the knowledge, the skill sets and above all a proven track record of helping non-profits achieve their goals. For years we have proudly represented many of the city’s leading non-profit organizations by raising millions of dollars on their behalf. Specifically, we focus on agency philanthropy, at risk children, education, first responders, family services, medical research, pet rescue, and veterans.
